{{Infobox character
| name = Yerin
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Ruler, Gold stage sacred artist, legendary Gold, Enforcer, Lowgold practitioner, teacher
| abilities = Path of the Endless Sword, Endless Sword technique, sword madra, Striker techniques
| affiliations = Fishers
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Yerin Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin Arelius]] is a formidable [[sacred artist]] and the disciple of a [[Sage]], specifically associated with the [[Path of the Endless Sword]]. A member of the [[Arelius family]], she is described as a wiry and thin warrior with black, straight-cut hair and facial scars. Her appearance often reflects a [[life]] of constant combat, characterized by tattered black robes and various weapons, including a white-bladed [[sword]] and silver Goldsigns that manifest as [[sword]]-arms from her back. As a practitioner of the [[sacred arts]], she possesses a pure spirit and has achieved significant strength, including an [[Iron body]]. Throughout her journey, she serves as a protector and companion to Wei Shi [[Lindon]], often guiding him through dangerous environments like the [[Desolate Wilds]]. Yerin is a highly skilled combatant who excels in physical challenges and maintains a philosophy that views [[life]] as an inherent struggle involving danger, challenge, and death.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|A disciple of the peerless [[Sword Sage]], Yerin follows the [[Path of the Endless Sword]]. Born a [[Ruler]], she possesses a low-energy boundary and intends to harvest her master's [[Remnant]] when the time is right. Clad in tattered black robes and white [[Heaven's Glory]] clothes, she carries a stolen iron badge and a [[gold badge]] featuring a [[sword]] design. During her journey toward the [[Ancestor's Tomb]] on a rosy cloud, she utilizes the [[Endless Sword]] technique and her ability to break [[scripts]] with [[sword madra]]. While fighting a [[Remnant]], she wields a flat shimmer of pure force and carries a [[steel]] limb on her back resembling one of the [[Sword Sage]]'s blades.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] is a disciple of the [[Sword Sage]] and follows the [[Path of the Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] is a warrior with shredded black robes and blade-straight hair.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] has a network of scars from her wrist to her fingertips.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]]'s boundary is not a powerful one and does not take much energy to operate.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] believes that when the time is right, a [[sacred artist]] must shed blood.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin's master]] was an expert without peer.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] intends to harvest her master's [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] was born a [[Ruler]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] [[Forged]] a flat shimmer in the air that looks like a [[sword]] hammered out of pure force.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] wears white [[Heaven's Glory]] clothes.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] can use [[sword madra]] to break [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] wears tattered black clothes and a stolen iron badge.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] is flying a rosy cloud toward the [[Ancestor's Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Endless Sword]] technique.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] fought a [[Remnant]] using her [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] has a [[steel]] limb on her back that looks like one of the six blades on [[the Sword]] [[Sage’s Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[gold badge]] with a simple picture of a [[sword]] in the center.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Yerin]] wears a [[gold badge]] around her neck.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Having once been an [[Iron stage]] practitioner before the age of ten, Yerin eventually rose to become a legendary [[Gold stage]] [[sacred artist]] and the disciple of a [[Sage]]. As a skilled [[Enforcer]] and teacher to [[Lindon]], she traveled with him while utilizing her white blade and the [[sword madra]] she could gather from her surroundings. During her time associated with [[Fisher Gesha]], she wore black robes provided by the [[Fishers]] and spent her days hunting [[sacred beasts]] and [[Remnants]]. Despite possessing a flawless foundation and overwhelming offensive power, she faced significant challenges during confrontations with figures like [[Kral]] and [[Jai Long]]. Throughout these trials, Yerin utilized her unique [[Goldsign]] and specialized techniques to combat enemies even when outclassed in raw power.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is at the [[Iron stage]] and is not yet ten years old.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c1">''Soulsmith'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is a [[Gold stage]] [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin's master]] was murdered.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is a legendary [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is a teacher to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] was missing from the camp.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is a skilled [[Enforcer]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is a [[Lowgold]] practitioner.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] was the strongest being in [[Sacred Valley]] by a long margin.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] possesses a white blade.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has a silver [[sword]]-arm on her back.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has a [[steel]] arm.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] wears a belt that is a [[construct]] forged from red [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is capable of using [[Striker techniques]] and acting as an [[Enforcer]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is traveling with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is a [[sacred artist]] with an extra limb due to her [[Gold]] status.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] looked down and stared at [[Resh]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is the disciple of a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin's spirit]] is described as pure and clean.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] wears a blood-red rope around her waist like a belt.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is of no clan.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] carries a sheathed [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] observes that the masked stranger is strong.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] can gather [[sword madra]] from her surroundings.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has crossed the threshold to [[Gold stage]] and possesses a shiny metal arm with a [[sword]] stuck on it.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] was given space among the main sect in rooms reserved for honored guests of the [[Fishers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is associated with [[Fisher Gesha]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has been spending her time with the [[Fishers]] hunting [[Remnants]] and [[sacred beasts]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] possesses overwhelming offensive power.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] wears a black sacred artist's robe provided by the [[Fishers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] possesses a bladed arm on her back.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] drew her white [[sword]] against [[Kral]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is wearing a collar.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is a miner.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is questioning [[Eithan]]'s identity.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] protested that [[Lindon]] was not sturdy.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] uses [[sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]]'s foundation is described as flawless.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is at the peak of [[Jade stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]]'s voice can be heard through the door.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] looks at [[Lindon]] with pity.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is only halfway through pushing madra channels through her entire body.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] fought almost without rest for a full night and most of the next day.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] left [[Yerin]] to watch over [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] uses a twisted seashell [[binding]] to spray water.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin's Goldsign]] flashed when a [[Remnant]] attacked.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is a combatant running with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] used a wave of [[sword madra]] against [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] is present during the confrontation with [[Kral]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has not risen from where she fell.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]]'s body had no weight to it as she drifted on the breeze.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has high skill despite being outclassed in power by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] possesses a bladed [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] has a master who used to say that no [[Path]] is wide enough for two.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Sixteen-year-old Yerin, a former [[Iron]] and the top-ranked student of the outer family, travels with [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]] while possessing a silver limb, black hair, red skin, and scars. As a [[Goldsign]] with stable [[madra]], she practices cycling meditation and early morning training to master her spear techniques and the [[Endless Sword]]. After absorbing the [[Remnant]] of her master, a [[sacred artist]] known as the [[Sword Sage]] who resides as a parasite in her core, she struggles with soul blockages caused by cycling within [[Blackflame aura]]. Despite the exhaustion of having her core emptied twice in one evening, she advances from [[Lowgold]] to [[Highgold]] and utilizes her silver [[aura]], [[blood madra]], and [[Enforcer techniques]]. Following a [[Ruler Trial]] alongside [[Lindon]], she eventually leaves [[Sacred Valley]] for the [[Desolate Wilds]], where they are adopted by a young [[Underlord]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] has a spiritual sense.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] was once an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is present with [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] practices cycling meditation.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] has a silver limb.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is a [[Goldsign]] with stable [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is a person who trains early in the morning.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is trying to get her [[Remnant]] to guide her.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's master]] is the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's master]] was much stronger than an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] has red skin and scars.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] has black hair.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] wears tattered black clothing.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is the top-ranked student of the outer family.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's Goldsign]] was quivering.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Endless Sword]] through her [[Goldsign]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is sixteen years old.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] groaned.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] absorbed her master's [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] uses cycling and breath focus to manage her frustration.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is straining against the limits of [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] has a slight blockage in her soul caused by cycling within [[Blackflame aura]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] uses a cycling technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] is [[Eithan]]'s little sister.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] uses spears.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] knelt before the [[Ruler Trial]]’s tablet with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] uses silver [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] possesses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] advanced from [[Lowgold]] to [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's master]] is a [[Remnant]] consisting of silver power in her core.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]]'s technique is the [[Flowing Sword]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]]'s technique is an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]]'s techniques on her [[Path]] are half a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's Goldsign]] is used for her [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's master]] is a [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's master]] is a parasite.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's master]] is a guest in her core.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] uses Goldsigns in combat.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] can use [[Ruler techniques]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]]'s core was emptied for the second time in one evening.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's spirit]] and body were aching with exhaustion.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin's spirit]] was likely weak after a battle on the main peak.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] left [[Sacred Valley]] and went into the [[Desolate Wilds]] with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A young [[Underlord]] had found [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]], adopting them.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|An eighteen-year-old [[Highgold]] [[sacred artist]] and emissary of [[Redmoon Hall]], Yerin is a companion adopted by [[Eithan]] who was sought out by [[Lindon]] following advice from [[Suriel]]. Clad in tattered black robes and marked by razor-thin scars, she carries two silver blades and a [[sword]] on a red belt while struggling to contain a sealed [[Blood Shadow]] worn as a belt. Despite rumors of being a [[Sage]]'s disciple and having earned rewards from the [[Arelius family]], she remains an illiterate warrior who has spent nearly two years following [[Bai Rou]]. After passing the [[Highgold]] application in first place, she assisted [[Lindon]] in preparing for a duel and expressed her intent to join the [[Skysworn]] to confront those attacking [[Redmoon Hall]]. Following a brutal encounter that left her bloody and broken, Yerin fought through exhaustion and rage to prevent the parasite from entering her core.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] has skin covered by razor-thin scars and wears black robes that are sliced and tattered.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] carries two silver blades and a [[sword]] buckled to her hip on a red belt.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]]'s power is sharp, cold, and not fully formed.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is a girl that [[Suriel]] told [[Lindon]] to seek.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is a reluctant host of a sealed [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is seeking the voice of the [[Sword Sage]] while cycling.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] has achieved [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] wears her [[Blood Shadow]] as a belt.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is eighteen years old.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|There is a rumor that [[Yerin]] was the disciple of a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] helped prepare [[Lindon]] for the duel.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] previously told [[Lindon]] that [[Jai Long]] thinks of him like a [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] was found bloody and broken on the stone.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] has a [[Goldsign]] that may be out of her control.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] cannot read.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] has blades on her shoulders.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] intends to go after those raising swords against [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is a [[sacred artist]] who has earned rewards from the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11">''Skysworn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin's master]] taught her the cost of [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] intends to join the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is not afraid of trials.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] entered the room where [[Lindon]] was working with constructs.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] has been following [[Bai Rou]] for nearly two years.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is a companion adopted by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is a person [[Lindon]] will be headed to.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is a participant in the [[Highgold course]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] passed the [[Highgold]] application in first place.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]]'s [[madra]] is rock-stable for a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] is an emissary of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] struggled onto his cloud, kneeling on it and flying over to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The parasite did not enter [[Yerin]]'s core.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin's spirit]] is exhausted from trying to keep the [[Blood Shadow]] from taking over.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]]'s rage is stronger than her fear.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] has most of her body down the stairs.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|While held in chains and shackles, [[Yerin's Goldsigns]] manifested as [[Forged]] silver madra blades, which extended from her back as two silver arms. Following her passage through a [[jade]] doorway [[sword]]-first, she utilized the [[Rippling Sword Striker]] technique and summoned her [[Blood Shadow]], a mass of living [[blood madra]] that forms a copy of herself. Despite having an empty core, she followed the [[Path of the Endless Sword]] and possessed [[madra]] dense enough to cross into [[Truegold]]. During her time separated from [[Lindon]], she spent periods running from [[dragons]] through the woods with [[Mercy]] and eventually met with a [[Sage]]. In her combat, she utilized her master's blade and [[Striker techniques]] against a [[Highgold]] before finally reuniting with [[Lindon]] in a black-and-silver blur.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] was held in chains and shackles.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] has two arms of [[Forged]] silver madra extending from her back that end in blades.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] are blades made of [[Forged]] silver madra.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] is made of living [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] passed through the [[jade]] doorway [[sword]]-first.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Rippling Sword Striker]] technique.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] is a mass of [[blood madra]] that forms a copy of her.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] would not leave [[Lindon]] behind.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] attempted to reach a portal to save [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] has an empty core.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] is meeting with the [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] taught [[Lindon]] principles of combat.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] were folded up over her shoulders.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Path]] is the [[Path of the Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]]'s [[madra]] is dense enough to cross the barrier to [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] is currently missing or separated from [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] is mentioned by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] spent time running from [[dragons]] through the woods with [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] uses a [[sword]] to push herself up.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]]'s arms feel a hundred times heavier than usual.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]]'s skin on her right arm is red-and-black, twisted, and almost melted.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has been apart from [[Yerin]] for a long time.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] uses a [[Striker technique]] against the [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] uses her master's blade.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] is a red [[Remnant]] copy of her.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] embraced [[Lindon]] with a black-and-silver blur.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|While piloting the [[Skysworn cloudship]], Yerin demonstrated her combat prowess by using three blades to slash acidic madra from the air. During a race for advancement, she beat [[Lindon]] to the end of [[Truegold]] by ten seconds, manifesting six arms of [[sword madra]] from her back as her silver Goldsigns were withdrawn into her spine. Following a period of severe injury where her lifeline was damaged and she faced death, Yerin eventually achieved the rank of [[Underlady]]. Now wearing green armor and possessing [[soulfire]] through the [[sacred arts]], she has grown her hair long and can manifest eight arms with Goldsigns that resemble [[steel]] blades. Having survived her ordeal, she carried an armful of treasures from the [[vault]] and is expected to be selected for the upcoming tournament.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] pilots the [[Skysworn cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] can slash acidic madra from the air.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] shine silver.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] uses three blades.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is a character in the story.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] asked [[Lindon]] if he was going to kick Gwei between the legs and run.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] pulled her Goldsigns close to her back.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] uses pulses of tightly controlled [[sword madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] promised the remaining [[Spirit Well water]] to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] can manifest six arms of [[sword madra]] from her back.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] can be withdrawn into her back.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] beat [[Lindon]] to reaching the end of [[Truegold]] by ten seconds.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] has six [[Goldsign arms]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is someone [[Lindon]] thinks would fight in this situation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] wears [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s skin is pale and her eyes are sunken.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s fighting style involves seamless movement.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s lifeline is severely damaged.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is being treated by [[Brightcrown]] healers.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is speaking to someone about survival.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is in a state of dying.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s advancement would involve her [[soulfire]] rebuilding her lifeline.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s goal is to become an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] needs to save [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] stood with [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]] wearing [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] can [[veil]] her [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] activated the [[Endless Sword]] technique using all six of her Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] wears green armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] possesses [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] practices the [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is someone [[Akura Mercy]] sought to save.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Damage to [[Yerin]]'s lifeline is a minor inconvenience to a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is surrounded by [[life madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is defending herself from whips of green madra.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] was in danger.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] look like actual [[steel]] blades growing on metal arms from her shoulders.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s green armor is pitted and cracked.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s hair has grown and now hangs into her eyes and past her shoulders.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] carried an armful of treasures out of the [[vault]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is present during the interaction with [[King Dakata]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] is expected to be selected for the tournament.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] has eight arms.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|While competing in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament, the [[sword]] artist Yerin utilizes six gleaming [[sword]]-arms and Goldsigns that sweep like claws. Although she is not an Arelius, she was adopted into the family and uses a blindfold to focus her perception, relying on her ability to feel [[madra]] rather than seeing with her eyes. During the conflict, she communicates with [[Lindon]] through a jewel-[[construct]] and fights alongside her crimson [[Blood Shadow]], which acts as a spiritual copy capable of observing opponents. Yerin demonstrates immense power by using her [[Endless Sword]] to protect [[Naru Saeya]] and employing Goldsigns to create a cage. Having advanced to the [[Underlord]] stage with [[Diamond Veins]], she eventually wins a fight against [[Lindon]] despite her body trembling with the effort of combat.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] is competing in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] possesses six gleaming [[sword]]-arms.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] uses Goldsigns that sweep like claws.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin's sword]]-[[aura]] can detonate into the [[Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Shadow]] technique.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] is not an Arelius.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] can only feel [[madra]] rather than seeing without her eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin's master]] almost married the [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] communicates with [[Lindon]] via a jewel-[[construct]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] was adopted into the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] uses a blindfold to focus her perception.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] possesses a purple crystalline [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]]'s [[construct]] uses dream and [[shadow madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] was once a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] has perception.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] fought [[Sopharanatoth]] in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] wishes he were standing with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin's sword]]-[[aura]] is effective at annihilating large ranks of weaker enemies.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] used the [[Endless Sword]] to cover [[Naru Saeya]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] is a factor in combat.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] stands shoulder-to-shoulder with [[Pride]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] is the only person physically stronger than Sophara.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] suspects her heightened awareness may be due to the [[Sword Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] or her evolving spiritual perception.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] blindfolded herself during a battle.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] used Goldsigns to make a cage.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] is a [[sword]] artist.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] used [[sword]]-[[aura]] to knock aside an attack.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] wears a sacred artist's robe that is a duplicate of the one [[Lindon]] first saw her in.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] has advanced to the [[Underlord]] stage.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] possesses [[Diamond Veins]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] is furious with [[Northstrider]] for pitting her and [[Lindon]] against each other.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] has a [[Blood Shadow]] that is a spiritual copy of her in shades of crimson.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] uses a red copy to observe her opponent.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] fights alongside her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]]'s body is trembling with effort during the fight.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] has a version of the [[Final Sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] won a fight against [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] is often mobbed by strangers.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21" />}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An apprentice to [[Timaias Adama]] and the heir to the [[Endless Sword]], Yerin is a [[Jade]] of [[Archlord]] level who possesses a parasite in her soul. While participating in a tournament, she was chosen as a pupil by the [[Winter Sage]] and eventually emerged as the sole winner after a battle against [[Lindon]]. Following her training at the [[Frozen Blade school]], she achieved the status of an [[Overlady]] and utilized a Steelborn [[Iron body]] to face Sophara. Despite being decapitated during their confrontation, Yerin utilized the [[Final Sword]] to produce a red-white light that blasted through a golden [[dragon]] image, ultimately winning the fight. She later witnessed [[Malice]] fighting the [[Dragon King]] and found herself pinned in place by both the [[Heart]] and Winter [[Sages]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is a person whom [[Timaias Adama]] considers a student or subordinate.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is someone who left with [[Adama]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is [[Adama]]'s apprentice.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has a parasite in her soul.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is a [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is on the same level as an [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is a potential future [[Sage of the Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is a fighter associated with [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is still in the competition.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses a gem-like dream tablet.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] looked concerned while [[Lindon]] spoke to [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is a companion of [[Lindon]] and [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] watched the fight from the [[Akura audience platform]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] were announced to be fighting each other, though it was a lie.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is scheduled for a month of training with a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] wears formal layers of black, violet, and silver.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has similar powers to [[Blacksword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is watching the [[Uncrowned]] matches with [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] wears a standard black uniform.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] closed her eyes as nine-colored light swirled around her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] chose [[Yerin]] as a pupil.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] gathered with [[Mercy]] and [[Eithan]] at the end of the cloudship dock.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has previously trained to sense [[sword aura]] in the freezing cold.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is staying in a network of wooden huts.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s outer robe was being shredded by the icy wind.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s [[Forger technique]] is brittle and weak.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Hidden Sword]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s foundation is adequate.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses spiritual sense to fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is the heir to the [[Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Meira]] was responsible for almost killing [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] can funnel advancement resources to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] fought a demon in a snowy village.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is aware of a [[Monarch-killing weapon]] being at stake.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s [[madra]] makes her [[sword]] glow silver.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] wants to see [[Yerin]] again.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is considered one of the most eligible young women in the world.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] hoped [[Eithan]] had permission for his actions.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] gave [[Mercy]] encouragement.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] had a battle with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is the only one left in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s spirits lifted when the [[Ninecloud Soul]] manifested.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses her [[sword]] and calming breaths to keep her [[madra]] moving.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] senses the flow of [[sword madra]] and her dormant [[Blood Shadow]] within herself.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin's spirit]] trembled and her core drained while controlling the [[Frozen Blade]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] was announced the winner by the [[Ninecloud Soul]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is a potential participant in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] fell toward [[Lindon]] with a raised [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is at the [[Frozen Blade school]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] decoded the instructions to absorb a power into her core.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is present during the discussion of the final gift.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] interrupted the [[Blood Sage]] and provoked him with insults.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] sees mirror images of herself from her own memories.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] saw her own look of serenity from the outside as she opened her eyes facing [[Calan Archer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s core was full but inactive while the [[Madra Engine]] settled.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] cycled [[sword aura]] amid a forest of blades.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] was demanding that [[Charity]] go get them.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is a character who uses blood [[aura]] and has a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]] on her [[sword]] blade.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is capable of gathering [[madra]] and [[aura]] into her [[sword]] to create silver-white energy.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] closed the gap with [[Yan Shoumei]] after [[Crusher]] tossed [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is fighting to ensure the safety of [[Lindon]], [[Eithan]], and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is on the path to becoming a [[Sword Sage]] once she reaches [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] does not back down from the person speaking to her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] was one of the top two fighters in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is wary of the way the [[Shadow]] looks at [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] was supposed to fight [[Yan Shoumei]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] won a recent competition.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] tried to do something to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s [[Overlord revelation]] was 'I am not him.'<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is an [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is going into battle against Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] discussed the possibility of a copy of [[Yerin]] being [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] and [[Ruby]] marched down tunnels to a waiting room.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] can use the [[Blood Sage’s technique]] to send power to her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has the mental enhancement from the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses a Steelborn [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] slammed her blade into Sophara’s.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] was an [[Underlord]] in the past.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] was decapitated by Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Flowing Sword technique]] empowered by [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has been haunted by nightmares since she was a little girl.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses red [[madra]] and silver madra.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] cycles [[madra]] into her [[Flowing Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Moonlight Bridge]] to appear behind Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Dross]] reported that [[Yerin]] won the fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] used the [[Final Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s technique produced red-white light that blasted through the image of the golden [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] might see Sophara saving [[Akura Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] was watching [[Malice]] fight the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] intended to use [[Penance]] and the [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] appeared in a white glow.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is pinned in place by the [[Heart]] and Winter [[Sages]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] was questioning the [[Sages]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is a character who recognizes the owner of the second cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Possessing [[ruby]] eyes and two metallic red [[sword]]-arms, Yerin wields a dimensionally superior power that allows her to warp reality. After merging with her [[Blood Shadow]], her spirit became tangled with her body and she utilized a black-bladed [[sword]] from her [[void key]]. During the conflict, she traveled via [[Moonlight Bridge]] and fought alongside [[Lindon]], even as her Goldsigns moved erratically and her [[Divine Treasure]] failed to recover. Despite feeling useless after losing her spine, she eventually dashed from a crack in space to focus the [[Final Sword]] through her blade as a [[Dreadgod]] moved toward her. Following these events, bright red [[madra]] veins replaced her broken flesh.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] has two metallic red [[sword]]-arms.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] has a crimson-tinted [[sword]]-arm.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] possesses immense strength that can warp reality.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin's perception]] is extremely powerful.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]]'s power is a dimension higher than a normal [[Lord]]'s.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] has [[ruby]] eyes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] uses a black-bladed [[sword]] from her [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] and [[Ruby]] have merged.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]]'s body has partially fused with her spirit since she merged with her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is a character whose master dove into the Valley with eyes open.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is present in the scene.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] stated she was not at her peak but was not made of glass.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] used [[Moonlight Bridge]] to travel.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] was attacked by five streaks of light.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is the girl who took [[Lindon]] away from [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] protected and fought for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] was sitting with [[Mercy]] and [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is someone [[Lindon]] plans to visit the [[Wei clan]] with.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin's spirit]] is described as being tangled with her body.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is a character mentioned by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] holds [[Lindon]]'s left hand.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] has metallic crimson Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is in charge of [[Lindon]] and Teris.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] has red eyes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] watches the evacuation from [[Lindon]]'s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Moonlight Bridge]] technique.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]]'s presence keeps her from throwing herself at the enemy.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is observing a rust-colored mountain stained with gold.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is at the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is standing on the bough of a giant tree.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] once ran from the school's pursuers in the wild territory.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] escaped on her own.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] dropped down through the hatch in the ceiling.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] possesses the [[Broken Crown]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] were moving erratically.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] describes [[Lindon]] as someone who does not give up.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] states that [[Lindon]] would not leave her alone if her core popped and she was no better than a [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]]'s eyes can glow red like [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]]'s [[Divine Treasure]] failed to recover in time.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] felt useless after losing her spine.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] mentioned having two minds in her head for a moment.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is an outsider to [[Lindon]]'s home.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] was caught by the tail of the [[Wandering Titan]] in a vision.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] dashed out of a blue-edged crack in space.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] focused the [[Final Sword]] through her blade.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Dreadgod]] moved toward [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]]'s body was covered in veins of bright red [[madra]] that replaced broken flesh.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|After being brought to the [[Sword Sage’s void space]] by [[Lindon]], the [[Blackflame Empire]] hero paused at the entrance of a [[Tomb]] where she had previously fought her master's [[Remnant]]. While located in [[Serpent's Grave]], the [[Herald]] engaged a [[Tomb Hydra]] with waves of razor-sharp [[madra]] and later drew her black [[sword]] as [[Ziel]] entered. During a confrontation, Yerin utilized the [[Netherclaw]] technique and was momentarily pinned by dense water madra while being attacked by incorporeal spirits. Following these events, she sat with [[Lindon]]'s group and expressed frustration toward [[Eithan]] before participating in an encounter with the [[Abidan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is present and questioning the anchor.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Malice]] can feel [[Yerin]]'s presence.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] brought [[Yerin]] to the [[Sword Sage’s void space]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] paused at the entrance of the [[Tomb]] where she had once fought her master's [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is playing a game of darts with sharpened blades of grass.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is considered a hero of the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] possesses dream techniques.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] eats eel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is located in [[Serpent's Grave]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] drew her black [[sword]] as [[Ziel]] entered.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] leaped with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] used a wave of razor-sharp [[madra]] against the [[Tomb Hydra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] cycled her last elixir and focused on the layer of red aura around her.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin's sword]], robes, and most of her hair are black.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]]'s eyes, Goldsigns, and one lock of her hair shine red.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Netherclaw]] technique.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] was not slowed down by the tridents.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] was pinned to the wall by dense water madra.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] was imprisoned inside a water technique.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] was being attacked by spirits that had no physical bodies.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] can trade an attack or two with [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] winced at [[Lindon]]'s state.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is [[Mercy's mother]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] sat next to [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] spoke from [[Yerin]]’s shoulder.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is part of [[Lindon]]'s group.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] has the blood aspect of her power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is a character who emerged from the [[Nethergate]] with [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] walked up to the [[Nethergate]] with [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] questioned [[Lindon]] about what happened.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] sat down on [[Lindon]]'s left side.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] expressed frustration at [[Eithan]] for letting her think they were catching up to him.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] is present during the encounter with the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A defective [[Herald]] and apprentice to [[Eithan]] Arelius, Yerin is an [[Overlord]] whose body and spirit exist in a state of near-perfect harmony. After appearing in a flash of white light upon a ship, she traveled aboard a [[Redmoon Hall]] vessel while wielding her black blade, [[Netherclaw]]. As an ally to [[Akura Malice]] and an associate of [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]], she sought to dismantle [[Redmoon Hall]] and utilized a [[void key]] to strike a deal with the [[Remnant]]. Throughout her journey, she has fought alongside the [[Blood Sage]], utilized [[blood madra]] for healing, and demonstrated the capability to battle [[Dreadgods]]. Now possessing six Goldsigns and an [[Archlord]] blade, she waits for [[Lindon]] at the entrance to the [[Soulforge]] with plans to eventually ascend.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is a person for whom an echo could be created.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is a person [[Lindon]] intends to call.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] appeared in a flash of white light on the back of a ship floating on the sea.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] possesses a black blade [[sword]] named [[Netherclaw]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is a defective [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is one of the six beings threatened by the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is a character for whom [[Lindon]] is creating a complex [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] intends to strip [[Redmoon Hall]] down to their bones once she learns what she can.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] mentions [[Yerin]] in conversation with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is aboard a vessel belonging to [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]] are allies to [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is mentioned by [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]]'s parents were killed by [[Blood Shadows]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is an [[Overlord Herald]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]]'s body and spirit are closer to perfect harmony than any other [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] uses [[blood madra]] to heal herself.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] has a [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] can translate the squeaks of [[Riverseed]] and possesses a [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is an associate of [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] has a relationship with a [[Blood Shadow]] that will become [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is an apprentice of [[Eithan]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is capable of fighting [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is a [[Riverseed]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] uses a hunger spear in combat.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] was passed by the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] collects [[natural treasures]] from her master's belongings and hunts them down.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is pushing for advancement.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]]'s [[vital aura]] is crimson.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] uses a [[void key]] to strike a deal with the [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] fought side-by-side with the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] possesses scarlet Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] has a red streak of hair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] has a soul oath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] asks why the [[Monarchs]] and [[Dreadgods]] are after them.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is a person who plans to ascend one day.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] felt [[Yerin]]’s [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is waiting for [[Lindon]] at the former site of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]], just outside the Ancestor’s [[Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] can pluck memories from the air.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] can vanish in a flash of light.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] waited for memory constructs to arrange themselves around her.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is at the entrance to the [[Soulforge]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] possesses six Goldsigns and one [[Archlord]] blade.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Appearing in a flash of white light alongside [[Lindon]], Yerin utilized her [[Heart’s Gem]] and [[Forged]] earth madra to remain standing as one of the few survivors of a test. After achieving an early [[Herald]] state, she gathered blood and [[sword aura]] in her cycling room at [[Ghostwind Hall]] before traveling toward a cloud fortress. Known as the [[Uncrowned Queen]], she used her [[Divine Treasure]] [[Moonlight Bridge]] and [[Phoenix Song]] technique to pursue [[Lindon]], eventually shining like a crimson star as she expanded her spirit into the surrounding blood [[aura]]. Following a battle where she killed [[Yushi]] and escaped by cutting through the [[Way]], she traveled toward the [[Rosegold continent]] to confront the [[Weeping Dragon]]. Despite being covered in burns and bruises from the [[Dreadgod]]'s attacks, she continued to push her limits through sheer stubbornness and the use of twin [[Remnants]]. Later, while meditating on the eighth [[Path of Heaven]] in [[Ghostwind Hall]], she utilized her Goldsigns and a [[Flowing Sword Enforcer technique]] to support others in battle.
