Eventually, she was seen wearing black armor after her ascension process proved less smooth than [[Fury]]'s.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is concerned about [[Mercy]]'s condition.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is a character who can explain things using '[[Sage]]' logic.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] possesses a [[Heart’s Gem]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] appears next to [[Lindon]] in a flash of white light.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has his arm around [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] was the only one besides [[Lindon]] still standing during the test.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are the reasons others like [[Little Blue]] or [[Mercy]] might be following them.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] was experiencing time dilation relative to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] uses [[Forged]] earth madra.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] has achieved a [[Herald]] state early.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Min Shuei]] was romantically involved with [[Yerin's master]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] sent a message through the [[Dreamway]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] was in her cycling room within [[Ghostwind Hall]] gathering blood and [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is a character who can activate [[Paths]] of Heaven.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is a character who expresses jealousy toward [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] hovered in front of the cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s [[Moonlight Bridge]] is a [[Divine Treasure]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] uses the [[Phoenix Song]] technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is referred to as the [[Uncrowned Queen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] flooded her [[sword]] with [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] went after [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] can push through advancement realms with sheer stubbornness.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] tells [[Mercy]] and [[Ziel]] to find [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] shines like a crimson star.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] can emit scarlet fury that outshines the sun.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] can expand her spirit to the blood [[aura]] around her.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] used her blade to kill [[Yushi]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] escaped by cutting through the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] felt the battle of the [[Weeping Dragon]] on the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Eithan]] once called [[Yerin]] '[[Yerin Arelius]]'.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s [[Phoenix Song]] can strip [[Remnants]] of their will, memories, and [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s heart tightens like a bowstring.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is on her way to the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is battling through a hostile storm and lightning-dragons.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] attempted to activate her [[Moonlight Bridge]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] has already shot off on her own.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is a person [[Orthos]] has dealt with previously.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is flying toward the combat area at high speed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] feels arrogant and intends to execute the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] moves toward the [[Weeping Dragon]] like a silver-and-red comet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] can float using only her will without manipulating wind [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] possesses twin [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] stole power from a [[Sage]] and a [[Herald]] to keep herself going.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Dragon was focused on [[Yerin]], attacking her with lightning and claws.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] was covered in burns, cuts, and bruises.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] wants to find material to make [[Yerin]] a real [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s [[madra]] is not compatible with the [[Weeping Dragon]]'s.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozriel]] hoped to see [[Yerin]] ascend.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] was wrapped in many bandages.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is one of [[Lindon]]'s flunkies.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is mentioned in relation to [[Mercy]]'s training.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] was in [[Ghostwind Hall]] meditating on the eighth [[Path of Heaven]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s eyes are like [[Fury]]'s and they blaze red.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] cycled her [[madra]] to its limit to remain standing under [[Malice]]'s authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin's sword]] blazed with red-and-silver madra.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin's Goldsigns]] used a [[Flowing Sword Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] pushed her Steelborn [[Iron body]] to its limits.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] wants to make her a [[sword]] artist in five seconds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] uses a hunger technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Death Icon]] is raising [[Yerin]] to [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] caught [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is restless and has been working on [[Eithan]]'s attack.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] has good insight into the advancement to [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] uses [[aura]] control to contain the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] provides support to Emriss.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] was keeping pace with [[Lindon]] as he flew through a gap between the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] used [[Yerin]]'s [[Moonlight Bridge]] to redirect her.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] uses black-and-white Striker techniques.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s cuts carry echoes of death.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]]'s ascension was not as smooth as [[Fury]]'s.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] used her [[Goldsign]] to cut a hole in the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is one of the potential [[Executors]] and has red eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] had warned [[Larian]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] is not on the other side of the rift [[Lindon]] opened.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] worried that [[Yerin]] might have been jailed.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] wears black armor.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Now known as the [[Death Monarch Yerin Arelius]], Yerin possesses Goldsigns and a [[Blood Shadow]] capable of [[Forging]] the claw. While [[Lindon]] once wished he could send her messages, she eventually joined him and [[Eithan]] as a group traveling through the [[Way]]. During this journey, Yerin advanced to the rank of [[Overlady]] [[Herald]] and envisioned her fragment as a world named [[Refuge]] where [[life]] could flourish. After emerging from a [[Way-portal]] alongside [[Lindon]] amidst [[Abidan]] warnings, she returned to visit her birthplace and remarked that the town felt like home.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] is capable of [[Forging]] the claw.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] is sent to solve problems that can be killed.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] is mentioned as someone who would have helped kill the [[Fiend]] quickly.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] wishes he could send a message to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] is mentioned by [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] has advanced to [[Overlady]] [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] leaned her elbow on [[Lindon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] is part of the group traveling through the [[Way]] with [[Eithan]] and [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] imagined her fragment as a place for [[life]] to flourish and for the creatures to live and spread.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] suggested the name [[Refuge]] for the world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] and [[Lindon]] emerged from a [[Way-portal]] with [[Abidan]] warnings.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] is visiting her birthplace.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] is known as the [[Death Monarch Yerin Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] remarked that the town felt like home.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] has a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] possesses Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“He was,” Yerin said, her voice distant.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Need to harvest his Remnant,” she said, stretching.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|"He's strong," she said to Lindon, though even she kept her comment to barely above a whisper.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Behind him, Yerin protested. “He's about as sturdy as a newborn kitten.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“I’ll admit that’s been my experience,” Yerin allowed, “but my master used to say that no Path is wide enough for two.”<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}
